title: ClientConfig
description: Configuration schema for a dynamic shell client build

clientId.description: Unique identifier for this client configuration

features.description: List of feature modules to include in this client build

defaultRoute.description: The module whose route should be the default redirect. Must match one of the 'module' values in the features array. When omitted, the first feature in the array is used.

FeatureConfig.description: Configuration for a single lazy-loaded feature module. Routing metadata (path, exportName, title, icon) is discovered from the library's own package.json nacs-contributions field.

module.description: The npm package name or workspace alias for the feature module

version.description: Optional specific npm version to install for this feature. When omitted, the local workspace source is used.

FeatureOverrides.description: Optional client-specific overrides for values discovered from the library's nacs-contributions metadata.

title.description: Override the display label for this feature in the navigation menu

icon.description: Override the icon for this feature in the navigation menu (emoji or icon identifier)
